positive: A vibrant, geometric illustration featuring stylized celestial elements: crescent moons, abstract constellations, and floating planets, arranged in a repeating, symmetrical pattern. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, gold foil, dusty rose, and burnt orange. Style: Mid-century modern art, Art Deco influence, vector illustration, flat design, minimalist, elegant, seamless pattern, high contrast, clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, printable textile design, 4k resolution.
